meta.title: Nozomi Networks: Lessons Learned After 1,000 Installations
meta.description: The Nozomi Sponsor Stage session from S4x19. First 10 minutes are on the company and offerings. 10:25 starts a description of common findings / security issues in the initial days after install. Good questions in the Q&A that starts at 19:20.
